heading: Federal radiation guidelines
label: 10007 Federal radiation guidelines
notes: Amendments1991— substituted “Secretary of Veterans Affairs” for “Administrator of Veterans’ Affairs” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 102–54
amendments: Amendments1991— substituted “Secretary of Veterans Affairs” for “Administrator of Veterans’ Affairs” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 102–54

children.text: determine the level of radiation exposure due to radiologic procedures which is unnecessary and specify the techniques, procedures, and methods to minimize such unnecessary exposure;
provide for the elimination of the need for retakes of diagnostic radiologic procedures;
provide for the elimination of unproductive screening programs;
provide for the optimum diagnostic information with minimum radiologic exposure; and
include the therapeutic application of radiation to individuals in the treatment of disease, including nuclear medicine applications.
